X2M Connect Limited ( (AU:X2M) ) has issued an update.

X2M Connect Limited has issued 58,333,333 fully paid ordinary shares, as detailed in an ASX filing dated 24 April 2026, under provisions that allow the securities to be offered without a full disclosure document. data.title: Q-linea’s 2025 Report Highlights Rapid Infection Diagnostics and ASTar Platform
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Q-linea AB ( (SE:QLINEA) ).

Q-linea’s 2025 annual report outlines its mission to help preserve the efficacy of antibiotics by providing rapid diagnostic tools that support optimal treatment of infectious diseases. The company emphasizes its strategy of leveraging strong in-house competence and infrastructure to deliver integrated diagnostic systems, with a commercial focus on consumables and global healthcare partnerships.

The report highlights sepsis and rapid antimicrobial susceptibility testing (AST) as key clinical areas, centering on the ASTar platform and its role in shortening time to optimal therapy. It also points to customer feedback, clinical evaluations such as the LIFETIMES study, and sustainability and governance sections, signaling continued efforts to validate its technology, deepen market adoption, and strengthen its long-term position in the diagnostics sector.

More about Q-linea AB

Q-linea AB is a diagnostics company focused on infectious disease testing, developing integrated systems that help healthcare providers rapidly and accurately diagnose and treat infections. Its main products and solutions support antibiotic stewardship by enabling optimized, patient-specific treatment decisions, with a business model that expects most revenue from consumable sales and a mix of direct and partner-driven distribution.

data.title: IwaiCosmo Holdings Lifts Profit 55% and Hikes Dividend on Strong FY 2026 Results
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

IwaiCosmo Holdings, Inc. ( (JP:8707) ) just unveiled an announcement.

IwaiCosmo Holdings reported strong consolidated results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, with operating revenues up 25.3% to ¥32.26 billion and profit attributable to owners of the parent surging 55.3% to ¥10.44 billion. Return on equity improved to 14.7%, while total assets rose to ¥213.03 billion and net assets to ¥74.30 billion, although the equity ratio edged down to 34.9%.

Robust earnings supported a significant increase in shareholder returns, as annual dividends were raised from ¥145.00 to ¥225.00 per share, keeping the payout ratio at 50.6% and lifting the dividend-to-net-assets ratio to 7.4%. Despite the strong performance, the group reiterated it will not provide full-year earnings guidance due to sensitivity to market conditions, opting instead to disclose quarterly results and dividend forecasts when reasonable estimates become available.

More about IwaiCosmo Holdings, Inc.

IwaiCosmo Holdings, Inc. is a Japan-based financial services group listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The company operates mainly in the securities and investment services industry, generating operating revenues through brokerage, trading and related financial operations for individual and institutional investors under Japanese GAAP.

Average Trading Volume: 132,193

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen88.2B

data.title: Sun Silver Sets May Date for AGM and Moves Further Toward Digital Voting
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sun Silver Ltd. ( (AU:SS1) ) has issued an update.

Sun Silver Limited has called its Annual General Meeting for 10:00 a.m. AWST on 25 May 2026 at Level 39 Central Park in Perth, Western Australia. The company is urging shareholders to participate in the meeting either in person or via proxy voting, with all resolutions to be decided by poll based on proxy instructions and votes cast on the day.

In line with Australian corporate law and a move away from paper-based communication, Sun Silver will not mail physical copies of the notice of meeting except to investors who have specifically requested hard copies. The notice is available on the company’s website and the ASX announcements platform, and investors are encouraged to update their details and lodge proxy votes electronically through the Automic share registry ahead of the 23 May 2026 deadline.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:SS1) stock is a Buy with a A$4.15 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sun Silver Ltd. stock, see the AU:SS1 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sun Silver Ltd.

Sun Silver Limited is an Australian-listed company headquartered in Perth and traded on the ASX under the ticker SS1. The company has a broad shareholder base that it engages through formal governance processes, including annual general meetings and electronic communications via its share registry and online investor portal.

Average Trading Volume: 2,045,760

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Alkemy’s Tees Valley Lithium Refinery Secures Cost Validation and Key Supply Chain Deals
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Alkemy Capital Investments Plc ( (GB:ALK) ).

Alkemy Capital’s Tees Valley Lithium project in Teesside has cleared a key milestone with an independent review by Logic‑i validating the capital cost estimate for its first lithium hydroxide train as robust and in line with global benchmarks. The finding reinforces earlier analysis that the refinery ranks among the world’s most cost‑effective lithium projects, strengthening its investment case and positioning within Europe’s emerging battery materials ecosystem.

The company also signed a memorandum of understanding with Buxton Lime to secure a framework for long‑term supply of quicklime, a critical reagent in lithium refining, and to optimise handling systems and domestic supply chains. Alongside this, TVL has advanced talks with neighbouring industrial operators on shared infrastructure and utilities at its Billingham site, while environmental and ecology studies returned no adverse findings, supporting timely mobilisation and de‑risking for stakeholders.

Spark’s Take on ALK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ALK is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (minimal revenue, ongoing losses, negative free cash flow, and negative equity with higher debt). Technicals are a meaningful offset, showing a strong uptrend and positive momentum, but valuation remains challenged due to loss-making status and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on ALK stock, click here.

More about Alkemy Capital Investments Plc

Alkemy Capital Investments Plc is focused on developing critical mineral infrastructure to support the global energy transition, primarily through its wholly owned subsidiary Tees Valley Lithium. TVL is developing Europe’s first independent battery-grade lithium hydroxide refinery in Teesside, targeting the fast-growing electric vehicle and battery materials supply chain in the UK and Europe.

Edinburgh Investment Trust PLC ( (GB:EDIN) ) has issued an update.

Edinburgh Investment Trust has repurchased 85,000 of its 25p ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange at an average price of 815.57p per share. The company plans to hold these shares in treasury, a move that can support its share price and potentially enhance net asset value per share over time.

Following this transaction, the trust’s issued share capital remains 195,666,734 ordinary shares, of which 65,358,709 are now held in treasury. The buyback reduces the number of shares with voting rights to 130,308,025, marginally increasing existing investors’ proportional ownership and influence in the trust.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Reckitt ( (GB:RKT) ) has issued an announcement.

Reckitt Benckiser Group has continued its share buyback activity, repurchasing 178,221 ordinary shares on 23 April 2026 through Deutsche Bank under an existing shareholder authority. The shares, bought at a volume-weighted average price of 4,756.82 pence, will be held in treasury rather than cancelled.

Following this transaction, Reckitt now holds 32,637,323 shares in treasury and has 641,368,429 ordinary shares in issue, which becomes the new basis for calculating voting rights. The updated share count affects how investors measure their ownership stakes and disclosure thresholds under UK transparency rules, potentially influencing institutional investors’ reporting and governance considerations.

data.title: Pulsar Helium moves to quash false private placement rumours
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Pulsar Helium, Inc. ( (TSE:PLSR) ) is now available.

Pulsar Helium has denied market rumours after learning that a third-party broker circulated false communications outlining terms of a private placement supposedly involving the company. The primary helium explorer said the purported financing terms have no basis and stressed that no such arrangement has been agreed.

The company is now assessing regulatory and legal options to pursue accountability against the unidentified third party behind the misleading financing claims. The response underlines Pulsar Helium’s effort to protect market integrity around its stock and reassure investors amid unfounded speculation about its capital-raising activities.

More about Pulsar Helium, Inc.

Pulsar Helium Inc. is a publicly traded primary helium company listed on the AIM market in London, the TSX Venture Exchange in Canada under ticker PLSR, and the OTCQB in the United States under ticker PSRHF. Its asset portfolio includes the flagship Topaz helium project in Minnesota, the Falcon project in Michigan, where exploration has not yet begun, and the Tunu helium project in Greenland, positioning the firm in emerging helium exploration regions.

See more insights into PLSR stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Ascent Resources Secures Royalty Upside from Utah Brine Lithium and Potash Target
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ascent Resources ( (GB:AST) ) has shared an announcement.

Ascent Resources has highlighted Neometals’ definition of a maiden JORC potash and lithium exploration target at the Utah Brine Project in the Paradox Basin, south-east Utah. Utah Brine Corporation, 51% owned by Neometals, holds 100% of the project, which is positioned as a prospective U.S. critical minerals asset.

Under a March 2026 access and use licence, Ascent and its partners granted Utah Brine exclusive rights to 24 inactive oil and gas wells, associated leases, infrastructure and related acreage for brine sampling, test work, extraction and processing. In return, Ascent is entitled to a 2.5%-3.5% gross smelter return royalty on lithium and potash sales from the covered area and 4.9 million Neometals options.

The structure gives Ascent low-risk, non-dilutive exposure to potential future commercial production from the Utah Brine Project without capital expenditure or operating risk. Management said the new exploration target, while still conceptual, materially enhances the long-term potential value of Ascent’s royalty interest and strengthens its strategic foothold in the U.S. critical minerals supply chain.

Spark’s Take on AST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AST is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance—zero revenue in 2024, persistent losses, negative equity, rising debt, and ongoing cash burn. Technicals add further pressure with the stock below key moving averages and negative MACD, while valuation impact is neutral due to missing P/E and dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on AST stock, click here.

More about Ascent Resources

Ascent Resources plc is a London-listed, onshore U.S.-focused oil and gas company. It leverages existing well infrastructure and partnerships to secure interests in energy and critical mineral projects, aiming to generate returns through royalties and similar low-capital participation structures in U.S. resource developments.

Average Trading Volume: 3,673,581

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell
